21235020.name: The Emperor's Mantle
21235020.desc:
Turn Start: Gain [DefenseBug] but green stack of Shield
 On Kill: Gain 1000 [DefenseBug] but green
 Turn Start: Gain 75 ~ 250 [DefenseBug] but green
21235020.flavor: The Legion of (Green) Roaches moves for no one but its Emperor.

21235030.name: Deity's Revival
21235030.desc: (One Time) If Green Emperor's health is below 0 regain 50% health and gain 1 ~ 50 [PlusCoinValueDown]

21235040.name: Emperor's Guard
21235040.flavor: The Emperor's guard will not falter

21235050.name: Emperor's Legion
21235050.desc:
[WinDuel] Inflict 20 [OffenseBug] but green
[OnSucceedAttack] with a skill inflict 5 [OffenseBug] but green
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] with a skill inflict 10 [OffenseBug] but green
21235050.flavor: Rip, seep, trickle, carve, tear, devour.

21235060.name: Roach's Feast
21235060.desc: Lose 50% more [OffenseBug] but green and gain 1 [DefenseBug] but green for every stack

21235070.name: Binding Vow
21235070.desc: Heal 1% max health for every 1 stack of Binding Vows on The Green Emperor
21235070.flavor: Why did I add this passive?
